subject: Fermi GRB 210601A: Global MASTER-Net observations report
submitter: Vladimir Lipunov at Moscow State U/Krylov Obs  <lipunov@xray.sai.msu.ru>
body:
V. Lipunov, E. Gorbovskoy, V.Kornilov, N.Tyurina, P.Balanutsa, A.Kuznetsov, F.Balakin, 
V.Vladimirov, D. Vlasenko, I.Gorbunov, D.Zimnukhov, V.Senik, T.Pogrosheva,
D.Kuvshinov,  D. Cheryasov
(Lomonosov Moscow State University, SAI, Physics Department),

R. Podesta, C.Lopez, F. Podesta, C.Francile 
(Observatorio Astronomico Felix Aguilar OAFA),

R. Rebolo, M. Serra 
(The Instituto de Astrofisica de Canarias),

D. Buckley 
(South African Astronomical Observatory),

O.A. Gres, N.M. Budnev, O.Ershova 
(Irkutsk State University, API),

A. Tlatov, D. Dormidontov 
(Kislovodsk Solar Station of the Pulkovo Observatory),

V. Yurkov, A. Gabovich, Yu. Sergienko 
(Blagoveschensk Educational State University)




MASTER-Kislovodsk robotic telescope  (Global MASTER-Net: http://observ.pereplet.ru, Lipunov et al., 2010, Advances in Astronomy, vol. 2010, 30L)  located in Russia (Lomonosov MSU, Kislovodsk Solar Station of Pulkovo observatory) started inspect of the Fermi GRB 210601A ( Fermi GBM team, GCN 30111) errorbox  17545 sec after notice time and 17557 sec after trigger time at 2021-06-01 22:14:50 UT, with upper limit up to  17.4 mag. The observations began at zenith distance = 53 deg. The sun  altitude  is -23.1 deg. 

MASTER-IAC robotic telescope  located in Spain (IAC Teide Observatory) started inspect of the Fermi GRB 210601A errorbox  25066 sec after notice time and 25077 sec after trigger time at 2021-06-02 00:20:11 UT, with upper limit up to  19.0 mag. The observations began at zenith distance = 57 deg. The sun  altitude  is -38.9 deg. 

The galactic latitude b = -8 deg., longitude l =  7 deg.


Real time updated cover map and OT discovered available here: 
https://master.sai.msu.ru/site/master2/observ.php?id=1626114

We obtain a following upper limits.
